data_quality: v0.1 best-effort population from cited public sources. Each entity's compat claims trace to source_ids on its attributes. Verification pass required before production launch; this dataset is sized to prove the engine end-to-end, not for general consumer trust.

sources.name: Home Assistant integrations registry
sources.scope: Used to confirm that an integration ships with HA core, indicating supported control path.

sources.name: CSA Matter Certified Products Database
sources.scope: Used to confirm a device's Matter certification (and therefore native interop with HomeKit, Google Home, Alexa, and HA via Matter).

sources.name: Zigbee2MQTT supported devices
sources.scope: Used to confirm that a Zigbee device works in Home Assistant via Z2M without the vendor's hub.

sources.name: Manufacturer product documentation
sources.scope: Used to confirm vendor-claimed ecosystem support (HomeKit, Google Home, Alexa) and whether a hub is required for that ecosystem path.

attributes.note: Native cloud ecosystem support (HomeKit/Google/Alexa) requires the eWeLink Bridge or pass-through from HA.

entities.name: Philips Hue White and Color A19 (E26)

attributes.note: HomeKit support arrives via Matter-over-WiFi after the firmware update is applied; not present out of box on early manufacturing batches.
Non-Matter Wi-Fi plug. HomeKit is not supported on this SKU; pick the Matter-capable P125M if HomeKit matters.
Matter-over-Wi-Fi plug. Commissioned directly into any Matter controller; no Tapo cloud required once paired.
Alexa-exclusive. No native HomeKit, Google Home, or Home Assistant integration. Only pick this if the household is committed to Alexa and values zero-config setup over cross-ecosystem reach.
Wi-Fi plug; HomeKit/Alexa/Google paths go through a SwitchBot Hub 2 or Hub Mini with Matter acting as a Matter bridge. Direct HA control via the SwitchBot integration.

entities.name: Schlage Encode Plus Smart Wi-Fi Deadbolt

attributes.note: Bluetooth sensor with built-in LCD. HomeKit / Google / Alexa paths go through a SwitchBot Hub 2 or Hub Mini (Matter) acting as a Matter bridge. Direct HA control via the SwitchBot integration.

entities.name: Aqara Temperature and Humidity Sensor T1

attributes.note: Outdoor-rated temperature, humidity, and barometric pressure sensor with an e-ink display. Matter-over-Thread on recent firmware; ecosystem-agnostic once commissioned.
Direct BLE integration in Home Assistant via the govee_ble component; no cloud, no hub, HA-only. No native HomeKit / Google Home / Alexa path.

entities.name: Aqara Door and Window Sensor P2 (Matter)

attributes.note: Matter-over-Thread; commissions directly into any Matter controller without the Aqara hub. Preferred pick when HomeKit + Google + Alexa + HA parity matters.

entities.name: Aqara Door and Window Sensor T1

attributes.note: Zigbee sensor; cheapest ecosystem path if an Aqara hub (or any Zigbee coordinator for HA via Z2M) is already on the network.
Bluetooth sensor with built-in motion PIR. HomeKit / Google / Alexa paths require a SwitchBot Hub 2 or Hub Mini (Matter) acting as a Matter bridge. Direct HA control via the SwitchBot integration.
Cheapest Zigbee contact sensor that works via Zigbee2MQTT / ZHA in Home Assistant. Native cloud ecosystem support (HomeKit/Google/Alexa) requires the eWeLink Bridge or pass-through from HA.

Lutron Clear Connect runs on a dedicated proprietary RF mesh, not Wi-Fi or Zigbee; requires a Lutron Smart Bridge Pro 2 (L-BDG2-WH) as its hub. HomeKit / Google / Alexa integrate via that bridge. Home Assistant talks to the bridge via the lutron_caseta integration. No-neutral install supported.

entities.name: Aqara Smart Wall Switch H1 US (No Neutral)

attributes.note: Zigbee 3.0 wall switch designed for homes without a neutral wire in the switch box; a common retrofit headache. HomeKit / Google / Alexa paths go through an Aqara hub (M2 / M3) acting as a Matter bridge; Home Assistant via Zigbee2MQTT or ZHA without the hub.

entities.name: TP-Link Kasa HS200 Smart Wi-Fi Light Switch

attributes.note: Wi-Fi paddle switch with no Matter firmware path; HomeKit is not supported on this SKU. Pick the Shelly Plus 1PM or Aqara H1 if HomeKit matters.

Single-channel Wi-Fi relay with power metering that installs behind the user's existing dumb toggle or paddle; no new faceplate required. Matter-over-Wi-Fi support landed on the Plus-gen firmware in 2024, giving it a HomeKit path via any Matter controller. Google / Alexa / HA work via native Shelly integrations directly.

Bluetooth water leak detector with a 100 dB local alarm and IP67-rated probe. HomeKit / Google / Alexa paths go through a SwitchBot Hub 2 or Hub Mini (Matter) acting as a Matter bridge. Direct HA control via the SwitchBot integration.

IP67 Zigbee water leak puck; drop on the floor next to a water heater, sink, or dishwasher. HomeKit / Google / Alexa paths go through an Aqara hub (M2 / M3); HA via Zigbee2MQTT or ZHA without the hub. No local alarm on the puck itself; notifications via the hub / HA automations.

Proprietary sub-GHz LoRa radio with quarter-mile range; trivially covers basements, detached garages, and outbuildings where Wi-Fi or Zigbee won't reach. Requires a YoLink hub; integrates with Alexa / Google via cloud, HA via the HACS yolink integration. No HomeKit path.

Gen1 Wi-Fi water leak + temperature sensor; no Matter firmware on this SKU, so HomeKit is not supported. HA integrates natively via the Shelly integration; Google / Alexa via Shelly Cloud. Pick SwitchBot or Aqara if HomeKit matters.

Wi-Fi thermostat with native HomeKit, Alexa (built-in speaker/mic), Google Home, and SmartThings. Home Assistant integrates via the native ecobee integration. C-wire required for most installs; PEK adapter available. Ships with one SmartSensor in the box.

Wi-Fi thermostat with HomeKit, Alexa, and Google. Supports up to 20 wireless remote room sensors (separate SKU C7189R1004) for true multi-zone averaging. Home Assistant integrates via the Total Connect Comfort cloud integration.

2024 release; the first Nest Learning generation with Matter support, finally giving Google's marquee thermostat a HomeKit path (via any Matter controller). Google Home is the native control surface; Alexa via the Nest skill; Home Assistant via the Nest cloud integration or directly over Matter (local).

Budget Wi-Fi thermostat (~$80). Alexa + Google native, HA via the HACS ha-wyzeapi integration (cloud-polled). No HomeKit and no Matter firmware path; pick Ecobee, Honeywell T9, or Nest 4th gen if HomeKit matters.

Matter-over-Thread motorized roller shade. Eve's MotionBlinds line ships pre-installed in custom-cut shades (Bali / Graber / etc. via select retailers). Commissions directly into any Matter controller; ecosystem-agnostic, no Eve cloud required.

Bolts onto the bead chain of an existing roller shade; no new shade purchase required. Zigbee 3.0; HomeKit / Google / Alexa via an Aqara hub (M2 / M3) bridging to Matter, or HA directly via Zigbee2MQTT / ZHA without the hub.

Clips onto an existing curtain rod and walks the curtain across; zero rewiring, zero new hardware on the wall, no shade replacement. Bluetooth direct or via SwitchBot Hub 2 / Mini (Matter) bridging to HomeKit / Google / Alexa. HA via the SwitchBot integration.

Cheapest motorized blackout shade in widespread availability. Comes pre-installed in fixed sizes; measure before ordering. Zigbee; HomeKit / Google / Alexa via the IKEA TRÅDFRI / DIRIGERA hub, HA via Zigbee2MQTT / ZHA without the hub.

Indoor pan/tilt camera that doubles as an Aqara Zigbee 3.0 hub and a Thread Border Router; HomeKit Secure Video native (HKSV requires an iCloud+ plan and Apple home hub). Google / Alexa via the Aqara cloud; HA via the aqara_gateway HACS integration. Ships with on-device AI gestures.

Indoor pan/tilt with on-device storage (microSD), no mandatory cloud subscription. HomeKit Secure Video native; Google Home / Alexa via the Eufy / Anker cloud. HA via the eufy_security HACS integration (third-party, may break on firmware updates).

Outdoor IP66 bullet cam with built-in starlight color night vision. Alexa / Google native via the Tapo cloud; HA via the tplink_tapo_p100 / tapo HACS integrations or onboard RTSP. No HomeKit path; pick Aqara G3 or Eufy if HomeKit Secure Video matters.

Outdoor pan/tilt with full ONVIF / RTSP support for local NVR pipelines (Frigate, Scrypted, Blue Iris). Native HA via the reolink integration; no first-party HomeKit / Google / Alexa path. The pick when local-only / no-cloud is the requirement; reroute through Scrypted to backfill HomeKit Secure Video if needed.

entities.name: Ring Stick Up Cam Battery (3rd gen)

attributes.note: Battery cam usable indoor or outdoor. Amazon-owned, Alexa-native; Google Home support was removed by Amazon in 2023 and has not returned. No HomeKit. HA via the ring HACS integration (cloud-polled). Ring Protect subscription required for any video history; live view works without it.

Cheap 2.5K indoor cam with starlight sensor, color night vision, and onboard event detection. Alexa / Google native via the Wyze cloud; HA via the wyze_v2 HACS integration (cloud-polled, occasionally rate-limited). No HomeKit firmware path.

Battery + chime doorbell with HomeKit Secure Video native; HKSV requires iCloud+ and an Apple home hub. Local face recognition runs on the included chime/repeater. Alexa / Google via the Aqara cloud; HA via the aqara_gateway HACS integration. Battery operation removes wiring requirement.

Two-camera battery doorbell (front + downward package cam) that pairs with a Eufy HomeBase 2 for local-only storage with no mandatory cloud. HomeKit Secure Video via the HomeBase 2 bridge; Alexa / Google via Eufy cloud; HA via the eufy_security HACS integration.

Tall 3:4 aspect sensor captures full package-on-doorstep framing without tilt. Native Google Home; Alexa via the Nest skill. HA via the badnest / nest HACS integrations (Google has restricted the official API). No HomeKit firmware path; pick Aqara G4 or Eufy if HomeKit matters.

Quick-release battery doorbell with head-to-toe 1536p sensor. Amazon-owned, Alexa-native; Google support was pulled by Amazon in 2023. No HomeKit. HA via the ring HACS integration (cloud-polled). Ring Protect subscription required for any video history; live view + chime work without it.

ONVIF / RTSP PoE doorbell for local-only / no-cloud setups (Frigate, Scrypted, Blue Iris). Native HA via the reolink integration; no first-party HomeKit / Google / Alexa path. Reroute through Scrypted to backfill HomeKit Secure Video if needed. PoE means one cable runs power + data; no battery to recharge, no Wi-Fi to drop.

entities.name: Philips Hue White and Color Candle E12
Philips Hue White and Color GU10 spot
Philips Hue White and Color BR30 (recessed)
Philips Hue White and Color PAR38 outdoor

attributes.note: Kasa-line bulb (older Kasa firmware, no Matter path). Pick Tapo L530E if HomeKit matters.
Signify's budget Wi-Fi line (parallel to Hue's Zigbee line). No HomeKit.

entities.name: GE Cync A19 Full Color (Direct Connect)

attributes.note: Decorative wall panels with onboard scene effects. No HomeKit firmware path; HA via the govee HACS integration (cloud) or govee_ble (local BLE) for some models.
Wired 4K outdoor cam with on-device AI tracking. No mandatory cloud subscription. HomeKit Secure Video native; Alexa/Google via Eufy cloud; HA via eufy_security HACS.

entities.name: Aqara Camera Hub G5 Pro (PoE Matter)

attributes.note: Outdoor PoE cam that's both a Matter device (commissions natively into any Matter controller) and a Zigbee 3.0 hub. AI on-device for person/vehicle/package.
Battery cam usable indoor or outdoor. Native Google Home; Alexa via Nest skill. No HomeKit firmware path. HA via the badnest HACS integration.
Battery outdoor cam pairs with a Wyze Base Station for local recording. No HomeKit firmware path.
4K Wi-Fi battery cam with optional solar panel. ONVIF capable for Frigate / Scrypted; native HA via the reolink integration. No first-party HomeKit / Google / Alexa path.

Native HomeKit support was removed by Arlo in 2023 across the cloud-managed cameras and has not returned. Google / Alexa native; HA via aarlo / pyaarlo HACS integrations. Pick Aqara / Eufy if HomeKit Secure Video matters.
Matter-over-Wi-Fi doorbell that commissions natively into any Matter controller. HomeKit Secure Video over Matter Casting. Battery + chime in the box.
Premium Zigbee dimmer with full RGB LED bar for status notifications. Native HA via Z2M / ZHA. HomeKit / Google / Alexa via Aqara / SmartThings hub bridging to Matter; not first-party.

entities.name: Leviton D215S Decora Smart Z-Wave Dimmer

attributes.note: Z-Wave dimmer; needs a Z-Wave controller (HA Z-Wave JS, Aeotec, etc.). No native HomeKit; Alexa / Google via the controller's bridge integrations.

entities.name: Aqara Smart Wall Switch H2 US (Matter, no neutral)

attributes.note: Newer Matter-over-Thread variant of the H1; commissions directly into any Matter controller without an Aqara hub. No-neutral install supported.

entities.name: TP-Link Kasa KP303 (3-outlet Wi-Fi power strip)

attributes.note: Hue-bridge compatible Zigbee bulb at 1/3 the price of Hue. Native HomeKit / Google / Alexa via the Hue Bridge or Aqara hub bridging to Matter; HA via Z2M/ZHA.
Ledvance / Sylvania's Zigbee-line bulb. Works with Hue Bridge or any Zigbee coordinator. Not a Matter device.

entities.name: GE Cync Indoor Smart Light Strip 16ft
Sengled Multicolor Smart LED Strip Plus

attributes.note: Pre-flashed with Tasmota or ESPHome firmware; HA-only by default. Local control over MQTT, no cloud. The pick when you want a smart bulb without a vendor cloud login.
Dual-lens cam with auto-tracking and 6× hybrid zoom. Native HA via the reolink integration; ONVIF for Frigate / Scrypted. No first-party HK / Google / Alexa.
Solar-charged battery cam, no wiring, no monthly subscription. HomeKit Secure Video native. Alexa / Google via Eufy cloud; HA via eufy_security HACS.
Cellular cam for sites without Wi-Fi (cabins, construction sites, RVs). Requires a SIM. No HomeKit. Limited HA support via eufy_security.

entities.name: Aqara Camera G2H Pro (HomeKit Secure Video)

attributes.note: Older Aqara cam, HomeKit-first. Doubles as a Zigbee 3.0 hub for Aqara devices. No native Google / Alexa; HA via the aqara_gateway HACS integration.
Amazon-owned Blink line. 2 years on AA lithium batteries. Local recording requires Sync Module 2 + USB drive. No HomeKit / Google. HA via blinkpy HACS.
Tall 3:4 aspect like the wired model. Battery-powered for renters / no-doorbell-wiring installs. Native Google Home; Alexa via Nest skill. No HomeKit firmware path.
Newer dual-cam doorbell with onboard microSD storage (no HomeBase 2 required). Wi-Fi 6 dual-band. Native Google / Alexa via Eufy cloud; HA via eufy_security HACS. No HomeKit.

entities.name: TP-Link Tapo Smart Battery Video Doorbell D230S1

attributes.note: One of the original HomeKit-native Wi-Fi plugs. Belkin discontinued some Wemo lines in 2024 but Mini is still active. HA via wemo integration.
In-wall duplex outlet replacement (not a plug-in module). Native HomeKit; doubles as a Wi-Fi range extender. HA via connectsense HACS.
HomeKit-native Wi-Fi plug with pass-through outlet (doesn't block adjacent socket).

entities.name: TP-Link Tapo P115 Mini Smart Plug

attributes.note: Smaller form factor than P100; energy monitoring on this model.
Original Encode (no Plus). Wi-Fi native, no HomeKit firmware path. Pick Encode Plus if HomeKit / HomeKey matters.
BLE + HomeKit-native; remote access requires a HomeKit hub (HomePod / Apple TV) or the Schlage Sense Wi-Fi adapter. No native Google / Alexa.
Key-free version of the Assure Lock 2; takes interchangeable smart modules (Wi-Fi, Z-Wave, Matter Thread) sold separately. Module choice determines which ecosystems work.
Invisible smart lock — installs entirely inside the door, key cylinder unchanged. Apple Home Key tap-to-unlock. No Google / Alexa support; HA via the level HACS integration.
Fingerprint deadbolt over Wi-Fi (no Bluetooth-only limitation). HomeKit not supported.

Retrofit lock that fits over the existing deadbolt thumb turn — does NOT require replacing the lock itself. Matter-over-Thread; commissions natively into any Matter controller. Apple Home Key tap-to-unlock.
Full deadbolt replacement (not a retrofit). Apple Home Key. Aqara cloud for Google / Alexa; HA via aqara_gateway HACS.
Fingerprint + keypad + key. Alexa native; remote access via Ultraloq Bridge (sold separately). No HomeKit / Google. HA via the ultraloq HACS integration.
Indoor air quality (VOC) + temp + humidity with e-ink display. Matter-over-Thread on recent firmware.
Cheap BLE temp+humidity logger with a wired probe option for fridges, smokers, terrariums. HA via the inkbird HACS integration. No cloud / no Wi-Fi.
TVOC + temp + humidity with e-ink display. HomeKit / Google / Alexa via Aqara hub bridging; HA via Z2M/ZHA without the hub.
Indoor air quality (PM2.5 + CO2 + VOC + temp + humidity). Native Google / Alexa; HA via awair integration. No HomeKit firmware path.
5-in-1 outdoor weather station: temp / humidity / wind / rain / UV. HA via the ambient_station integration.
PM2.5 + CO2 + temp + humidity. BLE direct to HA via the qingping_ble integration. No first-party HomeKit / Google / Alexa.
Quarter-mile sub-GHz range — covers basements, sheds, detached garages. HomeKit not supported. HA via the yolink HACS integration.
Part of the Ring Alarm system. Z-Wave; needs a Ring Alarm Base Station. HA via ring HACS or directly via Z-Wave JS if the sensor is unenrolled and re-paired to a Z-Wave controller.
Reliable Zigbee 3.0 sensor often white-labeled by ADT, Iris, etc. HA via Z2M/ZHA. No native HomeKit / Google / Alexa path without a SmartThings hub.
Includes accelerometer for orientation/vibration. SmartThings hub native; HA via Z2M/ZHA. No HomeKit.
Z-Wave PIR; needs a Z-Wave controller (HA Z-Wave JS, Aeotec, etc.). No native HomeKit. Long battery life (~5 yr).
Older BLE-only Eve Motion (predates the Matter version). HomeKit-only; no Google / Alexa. Pick the Matter version (20EBR9901) if cross-ecosystem support matters.
Wi-Fi puck with built-in 100 dB siren. No HomeKit. HA via govee HACS (cloud). Also sells as a multi-pack with a separate gateway.
Whole-home water shutoff valve with leak / freeze / pressure detection. Requires plumber install on the main water line. HomeKit support was promised then quietly dropped; HA via the flo integration.

entities.name: Phyn Plus Smart Water Assistant + Shutoff

attributes.note: Whole-home shutoff with pressure-wave fixture-fingerprinting (knows which fixture is leaking). Requires plumber install. No HomeKit. HA via the phyn HACS integration.
240V line-voltage thermostat for electric baseboard heaters; not for forced-air systems.
IR-blaster style controller for ductless mini-split heat pumps. Native HomeKit; no plumbing required.
Bosch's mainstream Wi-Fi thermostat. Requires a C-wire. No HomeKit firmware path.
Wi-Fi module that plugs into Mitsubishi mini-split indoor units. Native Google / Alexa via kumo cloud; HA via the kumo HACS integration. No HomeKit.
EU-favored brand; works in NA on 24V systems. Geofencing-first design. HomeKit native.
Custom-sized motorized roller shades shipped with a built-in HomeKit Wi-Fi motor. Order to your window's exact dimensions. HA via the smartwings HACS integration.
Premium custom-cut motorized shades on the Lutron Clear Connect mesh. Requires Lutron Smart Bridge Pro 2 ($150) for ecosystem integration. Quietest motors in the category.
Replaces an existing curtain track motor (or attaches to a compatible track). Different from the SwitchBot Curtain 3 — this is a track-style motor, not a clip-on.

entities.name: Yoolax Motorized Roller Shade (Wi-Fi + Zigbee dual)

attributes.note: Tilts horizontal blinds (Venetian / wood / faux-wood) without replacing them. Requires SOMA Connect bridge for ecosystem integration. The pick when you have existing blinds you don't want to replace.
Caseta switch (on/off, no dimming). Pick the Diva PD-6WCL if you need dimming. Both need a Lutron Smart Bridge Pro 2.
Caseta 4-speed ceiling-fan control. Replaces the existing fan-pull switch on the wall.
Z-Wave version of the Blue Series 2-1. Needs a Z-Wave controller (HA Z-Wave JS, Aeotec, etc.). RGB LED status bar; multi-tap scene support.

entities.name: Leviton Decora Smart Z-Wave Plus Dimmer DZ6HD
Leviton Decora Smart Z-Wave Plus Switch DZ15S

attributes.note: Tuya-rebadged Wi-Fi dimmer. No HomeKit. HA via local Tuya / LocalTuya integration once paired (no cloud needed for Tuya devices on recent firmware).

In-line relay that fits behind an existing dumb switch in the wallbox. Cheaper and simpler than a full smart switch swap. ESP32-based; can be reflashed with Tasmota / ESPHome for fully local HA control.

entities.name: Sengled Smart Wi-Fi Color Plus A19

attributes.note: No-hub Wi-Fi variant of Sengled's Element line. No HomeKit; HA via the sengled HACS integration (cloud) or via Matter-bridge through Aqara/SmartThings if paired to their hub.
Hue-bridge / SmartThings / Aqara / any Zigbee coordinator compatible. Sengled's BR30 form is popular for recessed cans where A19 won't fit.

entities.name: Sengled Smart Zigbee Soft White A19

attributes.note: Wyze's color-temperature plus RGB Wi-Fi bulb. No HomeKit. HA via wyzeapi HACS (cloud).

entities.name: Yeelight Smart LED Bulb W4 Lite (Matter)

attributes.note: Matter-over-Wi-Fi at the firmware level — works in Apple Home / Google Home / SmartThings without Yeelight cloud. Pairs via QR on the box.

entities.name: Yeelight Pro M1 Smart Light Panel (8-pack)

attributes.note: Per-zone addressable strip (8 controllable zones, extendable). Native HomeKit, no hub needed; HA via lifx integration over LAN.
Includes a 405nm HEV (antibacterial) channel. Native HomeKit / Google / Alexa. HA via lifx LAN.
Polychrome — multiple colors at once on a single bulb. Useful for chandeliers and effect lighting.

entities.name: Govee Outdoor Smart String Lights G1

attributes.note: Matter-over-Wi-Fi version. Adds HomeKit support that the older H6008 lacks.

entities.name: Nanoleaf Shapes Hexagon Smarter Kit (9 panels)

attributes.note: Touch-reactive modular panels. Native HomeKit (Thread radio in newer SKUs), Matter via firmware on later runs. HA via nanoleaf integration.
Hardwired ceiling-fixture panels. Matter-over-Wi-Fi at the firmware level.
Matter-over-Thread. Needs a Thread Border Router (HomePod mini, Apple TV 4K, Echo 4th-gen, Nest Hub 2nd-gen).
Per-LED addressable Christmas/holiday string with mapping camera in the app. HA via the ttwinkly integration (LAN). No HomeKit.
Budget multi-pack pick on Amazon (often 4-pack under $20). No HomeKit; HA via aidot HACS (cloud).
TV-back gradient strip with addressable zones; pairs with Hue Sync Box for HDR sync. Native HomeKit / Google / Alexa via Hue Bridge.

entities.name: Philips Hue Signe Gradient Floor Lamp

attributes.note: Cheapest reliable Zigbee color bulb on Amazon (~$10 in multi-pack). Hue-bridge / SmartThings / Aqara / any Zigbee coordinator compatible.
Matter-over-Wi-Fi version of the P115. Adds HomeKit + SmartThings native; energy monitoring retained.

entities.name: TP-Link Tapo P300 Smart Power Strip (3-outlet)

attributes.note: v2 hardware uses the newer ESP-based silicon and pairs faster than v1. Still no HomeKit.
Cheapest Meross plug; no HomeKit on this SKU (use MSS110HK for HomeKit).
Native HomeKit with built-in energy monitoring. HA via meross_lan (local push) or meross HACS (cloud).
Athom ships ESP32-C3 plugs with official Matter firmware. Optionally re-flashable with ESPHome / Tasmota for fully local HA.
ESP-based; can be reflashed with Tasmota / ESPHome (UART pads accessible) for fully local HA.
Local REST/MQTT API; HA integration is fully local (no Shelly cloud needed). Pre-Matter generation.
ESP32 generation. Local API + optional Matter firmware in beta. HA via the Shelly integration over LAN.
Matter-firmware Kasa plug. Adds HomeKit support that the older HS103 line lacks.
4-pack value SKU. HA via the Kasa integration over LAN (no cloud needed).

entities.name: Lutron Caseta Plug-in Lamp Dimmer PD-3PCL

attributes.note: Plug-in dimmer for incandescent / dimmable LED lamps; pairs with Caseta Smart Bridge / Smart Bridge Pro. HomeKit + Google + Alexa + SmartThings all native via the bridge.
Alexa-only; no Google / no HomeKit. Cheap when discounted (~$8) but locked to Alexa cloud — HA only via the alexa_media_player workaround.
Battery / solar PTZ camera. HA via reolink integration; no HomeKit / no HKSV.
PoE-only dual-lens camera with stitched 180° view. ONVIF + RTSP supported. HA via reolink integration; no app-store ecosystem support.
Cellular camera for off-grid sites. Requires SIM. HA via reolink integration (limited control).
ONVIF / RTSP supported. HA via the generic ONVIF integration.
Turret form factor; ONVIF / RTSP supported. Pairs with Amcrest Smart Home, Frigate, or generic ONVIF in HA.
ONVIF; pairs cleanly with Frigate, BlueIris, or HA generic ONVIF. Strong starlight night vision.
No HomeBase needed; 8 GB onboard storage. HA via eufy_security HACS. No HomeKit on this SKU.
No microSD — recordings require Arlo Secure subscription. HA via the aarlo HACS (cloud).
Needs Arlo SmartHub for local microSD storage. HomeKit support via SmartHub. HKSV supported.
Hardwired floodlight + camera. Alexa-native via Amazon. HA via the blink integration (cloud).
Pairs with Wyze Cam OG via shared mount for dual-view (wide + tele). HA via wyzeapi HACS.
Outdoor PTZ. RTSP supported (via Tapo app setting). HA via tplink_tapo_p100 HACS or generic ONVIF.

entities.name: TP-Link Tapo C720 (AI 2K + color night vision)

attributes.note: Dahua-OEM camera. ONVIF/RTSP. HA via Imou integration or generic ONVIF.
Requires a UniFi Protect host (Cloud Key Gen2+, UDM-Pro, UNVR). HA via the unifiprotect integration; HKSV via Scrypted.

entities.name: Aqara Hub G3 Pro (PT camera + Zigbee 3 hub)

attributes.note: Camera + Zigbee 3.0 hub + Matter bridge in one. HKSV supported. Doubles as a home base for Aqara contact / motion / leak sensors.

entities.name: Ring Indoor Cam (2nd Gen, with privacy cover)

attributes.note: Adds physical privacy cover vs Gen 1. Alexa-native. HA via the official ring integration (cloud).
1:1 aspect ratio (head-to-toe view). No microSD; needs Arlo Secure for recordings. HA via aarlo HACS.
ONVIF / RTSP available. HA via amcrest integration or generic ONVIF.

entities.name: TP-Link Tapo D235 Smart Wire-Free Doorbell

attributes.note: HomeKit-only doorbell — no Google / no Alexa / no SmartThings. HKSV recordings count against iCloud+ camera quota. HA via the official homekit_controller integration.
Pure ONVIF / SIP doorbell. No mainstream cloud ecosystem. HA via hikvision integration or generic ONVIF.
Free 7-day cloud (no subscription required). HA via the skybell integration (deprecated; some users keep it on legacy HA).
Latest battery-or-wired Nest Doorbell. Google-only — no HomeKit, no Alexa. HA via the nest integration (Google Cloud project required).

entities.name: Lockly Vision Elite (smart lock + doorbell combo)

attributes.note: Combined smart deadbolt and video doorbell in one unit. Replaces existing deadbolt; doorbell camera embedded above keypad.

entities.name: Eufy Video Doorbell S330 (dual cam, wired)
Inovelli Red Series Z-Wave Dimmer VZW31-SN

attributes.note: Z-Wave 700 sibling of the Blue 2-1. RGB notification bar; built-in scene controller (multi-tap up to 5x). HA via Z-Wave JS.

entities.name: Inovelli Blue Series Fan + Light Switch VZM35-SN

attributes.note: Single-tone white version of the Blue 2-1 dimmer for purists who want LED bar + dimmer behavior without RGB.
Original 600W Caseta dimmer — works without a neutral wire. Native HomeKit + Google + Alexa via Caseta Smart Bridge.

entities.name: Lutron Caseta Fan Speed Control PD-FSQN-WH
Lutron Caseta Pico Remote 3-Button + Raise/Lower PJ2-3BRL

attributes.note: Battery scene remote (no wiring). Mounts via wall pedestal or magnetic stand. Excellent companion to a Caseta dimmer.
Mounts over an existing toggle switch to keep dumb wall switch in 'on' position while giving wireless dimmer control. Pairs with Hue Bridge only.
Dimmer + relay in a single wallbox plate — common for ceiling-light + bath-fan combos. Z-Wave 800 long-range.

entities.name: GE Enbrighten Z-Wave Plus In-Wall Dimmer 14294

attributes.note: HA via the Kasa integration over LAN (no cloud). No HomeKit on this gen.
8" touchscreen wall panel with built-in Zigbee coordinator. Replaces a wall-switch box; runs Sonoff's eWeLink scene UI. HA via the SonoffLAN integration.
No-neutral inline relay — fits behind a dumb switch in older homes that lack a neutral wire. Hue-bridge / Aqara / SmartThings / any Zigbee coordinator compatible.

entities.name: Sonoff TX Ultimate (smart wall switch panel)

attributes.note: Matter-over-Thread + Apple Home Key (NFC tap-to-unlock). Needs a Thread Border Router. Native HomeKit / Google / SmartThings via Matter.

entities.name: Yale Assure Lock 2 Key-Free with Wi-Fi

attributes.note: Same form factor as the Touch but with no physical keyway — pure keypad. Pick the Plus / Matter variant if HomeKit needed.
Inside-only retrofit (preserves existing exterior deadbolt). Companion keypad sold separately or as bundle.

entities.name: August Wi-Fi Smart Lock Pro (3rd Gen)

attributes.note: Inside-only retrofit. Wi-Fi + Z-Wave + BLE — only model in the lineup with Z-Wave. HomeKit native. HA via the august integration.
BLE-only; no Wi-Fi — must be in BLE range to control. Cheapest Kwikset smart deadbolt.
Z-Wave only; needs Z-Wave controller (HA Z-Wave JS or SmartThings hub). Older but reliable; common alarm-panel pick.
BLE-only with fingerprint reader. No Wi-Fi — needs phone in range. HA via wyzeapi HACS but cloud-dependent.
PIN Genie randomized keypad (numbers shuffle each press to defeat shoulder surfing) + fingerprint.
Lever-handle interior-door lock (vs deadbolt). Adds NFC unlock (key-fob style) and fingerprint.
Bluetooth-only; HomeKit-native. Existing exterior hardware unchanged — all motors hidden inside the bolt. No Wi-Fi (needs HomeKit hub for remote access).
Same hardware as Premium minus the on-board speaker / mic. Native HomeKit / Google / Alexa. HA via ecobee integration.
Discontinued but still supported. Built-in Alexa speaker. Many users on HA still rely on the eb-state4 firmware. Hard-to-find new; common refurb.
Z-Wave 700 line. Cheapest pro-installer Honeywell with cloud-free local control via HA Z-Wave JS.

entities.name: Honeywell Home T10 Pro Smart Thermostat

attributes.note: Up to 20 wireless room sensors. No HomeKit; HA via the honeywell_total_connect / lyric integration depending on firmware.
IR controller that retrofits any IR-remote-controlled mini-split / window AC into a smart thermostat. Native HomeKit. HA via sensibo integration.
HEPA air purifier with built-in IR blaster — controls a window AC or mini-split while purifying.
Cheaper Sensi gen than the Touch; physical buttons (not touchscreen). HA via the sensi integration.
Adds HomeKit + larger touchscreen vs ST55. Native HomeKit + Google + Alexa.
Pro-channel Carrier thermostat. Limited ecosystem support — Alexa only. HA via carrier_infinity HACS for HVAC pros.
Zigbee variant of Yoolax's custom-cut shades. Hue-bridge / Aqara / SmartThings / any Zigbee coordinator compatible.
Clamps onto existing curtain rod (no track replacement). Matter via SwitchBot Hub 2 for HomeKit / Google / SmartThings.

entities.name: Hunter Douglas PowerView Gen 3 Hub + Shades

attributes.note: Pro-installed; expensive but excellent build quality. Gen 3 hub adds Matter on roadmap. HA via the hunterdouglas_powerview integration.
Lutron-radio (not Wi-Fi). Pairs with Caseta Smart Bridge Pro or RadioRA2 Select; native HomeKit + Google + Alexa via the bridge.
Wired-AC track (no batteries) — cleanest Zigbee curtain option for new builds. HA via Z2M/ZHA.
Drop-in motor for compatible Coulisse roller-shade tubes. Matter-over-Thread; Thread Border Router required.
Wired mmWave presence sensor — detects stationary occupancy (reading on couch) where PIR fails. Cheaper / simpler successor to FP1; FP2 adds zones. Aqara hub or Z2M with the FP1E quirk.
Up to 30 detection zones — turn on different lights based on which part of the room you're in. Matter-over-Wi-Fi for cross-ecosystem support.
6-in-1: motion, temperature, humidity, light, UV, vibration. Z-Wave 700 long-range. HA via Z-Wave JS.
Z-Wave; pairs with Ring Alarm Base Station only by default. Can be unenrolled and paired to a generic Z-Wave controller (HA Z-Wave JS) but loses Ring app integration.

entities.name: Bosch Smart Home Motion Sensor II

attributes.note: Motion + temp + humidity + lux. HA via Z-Wave JS.

entities.name: Tuya Zigbee Mini PIR Motion Sensor (generic)

attributes.note: Generic Tuya Zigbee PIR — sold under MOES, Lonsonho, Aubess, etc. Cheapest reliable Zigbee motion sensor on AliExpress (~$5). Z2M/ZHA only.
v2 hardware; smaller and faster wake-up than v1. Hue Bridge required for native HomeKit / Google / Alexa.

entities.name: Philips Hue Outdoor Motion Sensor v2

attributes.note: Replaces TRÅDFRI motion sensor. Zigbee 3.0; works with the IKEA DIRIGERA hub or any Zigbee coordinator.
P1 generation — replaceable battery (vs T1 with sealed battery). Smaller form factor than the original Aqara contact. Bridges to HomeKit / Google / Alexa via Aqara hub.
Part of the Hue Secure security line. Pairs with Hue Bridge.
Long-life CR123A battery (~5 yr). HA via Z-Wave JS. No native HomeKit / Google / Alexa.

entities.name: Bosch Smart Home Door/Window Contact II

attributes.note: IKEA's Zigbee 3.0 contact sensor. Pairs with DIRIGERA hub or any Zigbee coordinator. Cheapest mainstream Zigbee contact (~$10).
Generic Tuya Zigbee contact — sold by MOES, Lonsonho, Aubess, etc. Cheapest reliable Zigbee contact (~$4 each in 5-pack on AliExpress). Z2M/ZHA only.
BLE-only Eve contact (predates the Matter version). HomeKit-only — no Google / Alexa. Pick the Matter version (10EBR9901) for cross-ecosystem support.
1/4-mile LoRa range. Pairs with YoLink Hub only. HA via the yolink integration (cloud).
DSC / Tyco-affiliated alarm-grade contact. Long-life. HA via Z2M/ZHA.
Larger e-paper screen than Meter Plus. Matter via SwitchBot Hub 2.
Cheapest BLE temp+humid (~$10 / 2-pack). HA via the bluetooth integration (passive listen) — no cloud needed.
Pairs only with an Ecobee thermostat (Premium / Lite / 4 / 3+). Reports occupancy + temp. HA via the ecobee integration once thermostat is registered.
Matter-over-Thread version with VOC + temp + humidity. Thread Border Router needed.
BLE HomeKit-native sensor with built-in display. HA via homekit_controller. Cheapest HomeKit-native temp sensor.
Inkbird's BLE line is a popular sous-vide / smoker pick. HA via the bluetooth + inkbird integration (passive).

entities.name: Third Reality Zigbee Temperature + Humidity Sensor

attributes.note: PM2.5 + temp + humidity + VOC. Pairs with DIRIGERA hub or any Zigbee coordinator. Bridges to HomeKit via the DIRIGERA Matter exposure.
Generic Tuya Zigbee — MOES, Lonsonho, Aubess, etc. Cheapest Zigbee temp+humid (~$5).

entities.name: Aqara Temperature & Humidity Sensor T1 Pro

attributes.note: Successor to the original WSDCGQ11LM. Smaller and lower-power. Aqara hub bridges to HomeKit / Google / Alexa.
Higher-end ultrasonic station — no moving parts vs WS-2902. Reports to Ambient Network + Weather Underground. HA via the ambient_station integration.
1/4-mile LoRa — works in basements / detached structures where Wi-Fi can't reach. Pairs only with YoLink Hub.
T1 generation. Aqara hub bridges to HomeKit / Google / Alexa via Matter.

entities.name: Ring Alarm Flood + Freeze Sensor (2nd Gen)

attributes.note: Built-in 85 dB siren. Pairs with IKEA DIRIGERA hub or any Zigbee coordinator. Bridges to HomeKit via DIRIGERA Matter.
Premium Z-Wave puck — also reports temperature and tamper. Long-life CR123A. HA via Z-Wave JS.

entities.name: Third Reality Zigbee Water Leak Sensor
Govee Outdoor String Lights G2 (48ft RGBIC)

attributes.note: Per-bulb addressable RGBIC outdoor strings. No HomeKit; HA via the govee2mqtt bridge or LAN integration. Govee's #1 patio SKU.

entities.name: Govee Neon Rope Light 2 Pro (16.4ft RGBIC)

attributes.note: Bendable silicone neon rope, RGBIC per segment. Stick-on with cable clips. HA via govee2mqtt.

entities.name: Govee RGBIC Pro LED Strip 16.4ft H619B
Govee Smart Christmas String Lights H70B1 (200 LED)

attributes.note: Holiday-pattern outdoor string. Pre-set Christmas / Halloween / July 4th scene library in the Govee app.

entities.name: Govee Immersion TV Light Strip Kit (55-65")

attributes.note: Camera-based Ambilight clone — clip-on cam reads the screen and drives the strip. No HomeKit.

entities.name: Govee Lyra Corner Floor Lamp H6072

attributes.note: Twinkly's mid-density string. Mapping app paints text/animations onto the tree using the phone camera. HA via the twinkly integration over LAN.

entities.name: Twinkly Festoon Smart String Lights (40 LED, 66ft)

attributes.note: Cheaper Nanoleaf alternative — daisy-chained hex panels. HA via cololight integration over LAN.

entities.name: LE LampUX A19 Color Smart Bulb (4-pack)
LE LampUX PAR38 Outdoor Smart Floodlight
Philips Hue Festavia String Light (250 LED, 65ft)

attributes.note: Hue's premium outdoor string. Per-LED gradient; needs Hue Bridge. Sync with Hue Sync TV box for movie effects.
Companion strip for the 42-50" Hue Sync TV scenario. Pair with Hue Sync TV box or Hue Sync app on Roku/Apple TV.

entities.name: WiZ Filament ST19 Tunable White E26

attributes.note: Decorative Edison-style filament. Matter-over-Wi-Fi capable; Matter QR on the box.
Matter-over-Wi-Fi addressable strip. Pair via Matter QR; works without Yeelight cloud.
Matter-over-Thread variant of the Essentials lightstrip — discontinued the Wi-Fi-only SKU. Border router required.
Successor to the T1; Matter-over-Thread for direct ecosystem pairing without an Aqara hub.

entities.name: Philips Hue Lightguide Globe G125 (clear, white & color)

attributes.note: Decorative clear-glass globe — visible color via internal lightguide. Hue Bridge for full feature set; BLE for proximity-only control.

entities.name: LEDVANCE Sylvania Smart+ Filament Globe G25

attributes.note: BLE-only HomeKit-native filament. No cloud, no Wi-Fi. HA via homekit_controller.

entities.name: Sengled Solo Tunable White A19 (no hub)

attributes.note: Bluetooth Mesh — pair directly with Echo speaker as Bluetooth-mesh AP. No Google / no HomeKit.

entities.name: IKEA TRADFRI E12 Candle Tunable White

attributes.note: Athom flashes ESPHome / Matter firmware before shipping — fully local control. HomeKit / Google / Alexa via Matter.

entities.name: Inovelli ILUMIN Z-Wave RGB Color A19

attributes.note: One of the few Z-Wave color bulbs on the market. Pairs with any Z-Wave controller (HA Z-Wave JS, SmartThings).
Cheaper S40 variant without energy monitoring. Matter QR for direct HomeKit / Google / Alexa pairing.

entities.name: Sonoff S26 R2 Wi-Fi Smart Plug

attributes.note: Cheap eWeLink Wi-Fi plug. HA via SonoffLAN / eWeLink integration.
DIN-rail-friendly inline meter — accurate kWh logging. HA via SonoffLAN over LAN (no cloud).

entities.name: Sonoff ZB Mini R4 (Zigbee inline relay)

attributes.note: Zigbee inline relay — fits behind a wall switch. Hue-bridge / Aqara / SmartThings / any Zigbee coordinator compatible.
Thread-radio variant of Athom's plug — better mesh extender than the Wi-Fi version. Border router required.
Aqara T1 with energy monitoring; bridges to Matter via M2 / Hub Pro for native HomeKit / Google.
Zigbee outdoor plug — pairs natively to Hue Bridge for instant HomeKit / Google / Alexa.
Two outlets + USB-C power, both individually addressable. Energy monitoring per outlet.
Native HomeKit dual outdoor outlet (rare combo). Discontinued but still available; HA via the homekit_controller integration.

entities.name: TP-Link Tapo P230 In-Wall Smart Outlet

attributes.note: Replaces a standard duplex receptacle. Both outlets individually controllable.
3rd-gen redesign — smaller form factor than 2nd gen. Energy monitoring + Matter-over-Thread.
Z-Wave Plus mini plug. HA via Z-Wave JS — fully local.
15A appliance plug — sump pumps, dehumidifiers, sous-vide rigs. Reports kWh.
Cheap Zigbee plug with energy meter. Z2M / ZHA only — no native cloud.
Cheapest battery Reolink. HA via reolink integration.
Pairs with Reolink RLN8 NVR. ONVIF + RTSP supported.
Person/vehicle/pet detection at the edge. ONVIF + RTSP.
Off-grid PTZ with auto-tracking. Requires SIM card.
Add-on cam for Lorex NVR systems. ONVIF supported.
Wi-Fi bullet. ONVIF + RTSP supported. HA via the amcrest integration.
AI person/vehicle detection. ONVIF supported.
Built-in spotlight + 2-way audio. ONVIF + RTSP.

entities.name: Imou Cell Pro Battery Camera Kit

attributes.note: Wired Eufy SoloCam — cheapest non-battery model. HA via eufy_security HACS (cloud).
Battery + integrated spotlight. HomeKit-compatible without SmartHub. HKSV unavailable.
Hard-wired install (replaces existing floodlight). Sync Module 2 for local USB storage.

entities.name: Google Nest Cam Indoor (1st gen, wired)

attributes.note: Original Nest Cam — discontinued but still supported. HA via the Google Nest integration.
2K successor to V3. RTSP firmware available via Wyze Labs.

entities.name: TP-Link Tapo C420S2 (Battery Cam Kit, 2-pack + Hub)

attributes.note: Bundle includes 2 cameras + the H200 SmartHub. Local recording on hub microSD; no Tapo Care subscription required for basic use.
Cheap-end ONVIF / RTSP bullet — pairs with Frigate, Blue Iris, Synology Surveillance Station.

entities.name: Aqara Camera Hub E1 (E1 + Hub G3 functionality)

attributes.note: Doubles as an Aqara Zigbee hub — pair Aqara contact / motion / leak sensors directly to it. HKSV via the Aqara Home iOS app.
AcuSense edge AI dome. ONVIF / RTSP supported. Common Frigate / Blue Iris pick.
Head-to-toe 1:1 aspect, 3D motion (radar). Hardwired only. HA via ring integration (cloud).
Cheapest hardwired Ring. Requires existing doorbell wiring.

entities.name: Google Nest Doorbell Wired 2nd Gen (battery variant)

attributes.note: Same hardware as the wired 2nd-gen, configurable for battery use. HA via Google Nest.
Indoor chime included. No HomeKit; HA via generic onvif if RTSP enabled in firmware.
Successor to the original Wyze Doorbell. 2K resolution + free 24h cloud rolling buffer.
Pairs with Tapo H200 SmartHub for chime + local recording. No HomeKit.
Free 3-day cloud rolling buffer (rare). HA via generic onvif if RTSP enabled.
Front + downward package camera in one unit. Discontinued (Kuna shut down) but inventory still moves.
Pro-grade PoE doorbell — pairs with Hikvision NVR or Frigate via ONVIF / RTSP.
Battery variant of the S330 — supports wired + battery hybrid mode. HA via eufy_security HACS (cloud).
Non-dimming on/off variant of the Blue 2-1. Same LED bar / scene controller behavior. Useful where a dimmer is electrically wrong (e.g. fan motor, fluorescent ballast).

entities.name: Inovelli Red Series Z-Wave 700 Dimmer LZW31-SN

attributes.note: Older Red Series dimmer (predates VZW31-SN). Z-Wave 700 long-range. HA via Z-Wave JS.

entities.name: Inovelli Blue Series Notifier 2-1 (read-only LED bar)

attributes.note: Wall-plate Notification bar — no load attached, just an addressable LED strip wired into a switch box for status display (laundry done, garage open, etc.).

entities.name: Lutron Caseta Outdoor Smart Plug PD-3OUT

attributes.note: Lutron's outdoor on/off plug — dual-outlet weatherproof. Pairs with Caseta Smart Bridge. Native HomeKit / Google / Alexa via the bridge.
Pairs ONLY with Hue Bridge — locks dumb wall switch in 'on' position so smart bulbs stay reachable. Identical hardware to the regular Aurora but Hue-only firmware.

entities.name: Leviton Decora Smart Wi-Fi 2nd Gen Switch DW15S-2RW
Leviton Decora Smart Wi-Fi Dimmer DW6HD

attributes.note: MyLeviton Wi-Fi line. HA via decora_wifi integration.

entities.name: Leviton Decora Smart Z-Wave Plus Switch DZ15S
GE Enbrighten Z-Wave Plus Smart Switch 14292

attributes.note: Add-on companion (no radio) — wires into the second box of a 3-way circuit and signals via traveler. Master must be 14292 / 14294.
Dual relay module that fits behind a dumb 2-gang switch. Each relay independently controllable.
Reads doorbell transformer / garage door / alarm panel signals into Z-Wave events. No load switching — pure sensor.
Refreshed v3 hardware. HA via the Kasa integration over LAN.
2-pack — primary + add-on. Both have Wi-Fi (no traveler wire required).

entities.name: TP-Link Kasa HS105 Mini Wi-Fi Plug

attributes.note: Older Kasa mini plug — superseded by KP125, but cheaper used. HA via the Kasa integration over LAN.

entities.name: Sonoff iFan04 (Wi-Fi Smart Ceiling Fan Controller)

attributes.note: Replaces a dumb ceiling-fan canopy module — separate fan-speed and light-on/off control. HA via SonoffLAN.
Capacitive-touch 3-gang glass wall panel. eWeLink scenes built-in.

entities.name: Aqara Smart Wall Switch H2 (no neutral, 2-button)

attributes.note: Decora-style 2-button switch, no neutral required (good for older homes). Bridges to HomeKit / Google / Alexa via Aqara Hub M2 / Hub Pro Matter exposure.
Replaces a 2-gang switch with a built-in touchscreen control panel + Alexa / Google / HomeKit. Hardwired.
Native HomeKit over BLE; needs the Sense Wi-Fi Adapter for remote access without a HomeKit hub.
Z-Wave Plus only; pairs with HA Z-Wave JS / SmartThings hub. Most common alarm-panel deadbolt.
Wi-Fi-only variant (no Z-Wave / Matter). Pick the Plus for Matter / HomeKit.
Smaller and quieter than the 3rd Gen Pro. No Z-Wave (use Pro for Z-Wave). HA via the august integration.
Fingerprint-only (no keypad). 50 fingerprints stored. Pick Aqara U200 / Schlage Encode Plus for HomeKit + fingerprint.
Retrofit (preserves existing exterior cylinder) + external keypad with NFC + fingerprint. Matter-over-Thread; Apple Home Key supported.

entities.name: Aqara Smart Door Lock A100 Pro (Zigbee)

attributes.note: Full mortise replacement (not retrofit) — needs Aqara Hub M2 / Hub Pro to bridge to HomeKit.

entities.name: Lockly Visage Face Recognition Smart Lock

attributes.note: Edge face-recognition unlock + PIN Genie shuffled keypad + fingerprint. Premium tier.

entities.name: Eufy Security Smart Lock C210 (fingerprint deadbolt)

attributes.note: Cheaper Eufy lock; BLE-only by default — needs HomeBase 2 for Wi-Fi remote unlock.
Cheaper Wi-Fi-bridge variant (vs the Latch 5). Pairs with U-tec / Ultraloq cloud.

entities.name: Igloohome Smart Rim Lock SR1 (Bluetooth + PIN)

attributes.note: Offline algoPIN (rolling time-bound PIN codes for AirBnB hosts) — works without internet. BLE only by default; Wi-Fi bridge sold separately.
Apple Home Key (NFC tap) + Matter-over-Wi-Fi (no Connect bridge required). Invisible deadbolt — all electronics inside the bolt.
Companion bundle to the Approach (inside-only). External keypad sold separately or together.
Bluetooth Mesh variant — pairs to Echo speakers as Bluetooth-mesh APs. No Wi-Fi; no native HomeKit / Google.
Up to 20 wireless room sensors. No HomeKit; HA via the lyric / honeywell_total_connect integration.
Older non-touchscreen Sensi. Still supported in HA via the sensi integration.
Bosch's mid-tier — multi-stage HVAC support. HA via the bosch integration.
Direct mini-split smart controller. Native HomeKit + Matter support on roadmap.
240V high-voltage thermostat for electric baseboards. Native HomeKit.
IR-based mini-split / window AC controller. No HomeKit native; HA via the cielo integration.
EU-focused; Matter-over-Thread. Pairs with tado° smart radiator valves for whole-home zoned heating.

entities.name: Aqara Smart Radiator Thermostat E1 (Zigbee TRV)

attributes.note: Per-radiator TRV (EU water-heating systems). Aqara Hub bridges to HomeKit / Google / Alexa via Matter.
Original Sensi Wi-Fi. Discontinued but still supported on Sensi cloud + HA sensi integration.
Discontinued Ecobee3 Lite — still receives security updates. Common refurb pick.
Wi-Fi (Tuya) variant of Yoolax's custom-cut shades. HA via local_tuya.
Clamps onto an existing curtain rod. Bridges to HomeKit via Aqara Hub M2 / Hub Pro.
Drop-in motor for compatible roller-shade tubes. Matter-over-Thread; Border router required.
Pulls heavier curtains than the standard Curtain 3. Matter via SwitchBot Hub 2.
Replaces existing curtain rod with a motorized one (vs Curtain 3 which clamps onto an existing rod).
Premium tier — made-to-measure roller. Pairs with Caseta Smart Bridge Pro (NOT the basic Smart Bridge). Native HomeKit + Google + Alexa.
Pro-installer line — typically RadioRA2 or HomeWorks QS systems. Most expensive Lutron tier.

entities.name: Hunter Douglas PowerView Gen 2 Hub + Shades

attributes.note: Older Gen 2 hub still supported. Gen 3 adds Matter on roadmap; Gen 2 sticks to native HomeKit.
Motorizes existing roller blinds with a bead chain. Soma Connect bridge enables HomeKit + remote access.
Cheapest Zigbee roller motor on AliExpress. HA via Z2M / ZHA.
Cellular (vs the FYRTUR roller). Pairs with DIRIGERA hub or any Zigbee coordinator.
Generic Tuya Zigbee — sold under MOES, Lonsonho, etc. HA via Z2M / ZHA only (some quirks needed).
OEM motor that Eve sells as MotionBlinds — ships in many made-to-measure shade tubes (e.g. Cellular Shop, Levolor SimpleSwitch). Matter-over-Thread.
T1 successor to the original Aqara motion sensor. Reports lux + motion. Aqara Hub bridges to HomeKit via Matter.
Motion + temperature + light. Smaller than the MultiSensor 7.
Successor to the SNZB-03 — longer battery life, smaller form factor. Hue-bridge / Aqara / SmartThings / any Zigbee coordinator compatible.
Predecessor to the MultiSensor 7. Still widely deployed. HA via Z-Wave JS.

entities.name: Schlage Sense Motion Sensor (paired with lock)

attributes.note: Companion sensor — only triggers via Schlage Sense ecosystem. Niche; included for completeness.
Insteon shut down in 2022 then partially revived under new ownership. Buy only if you already have an Insteon hub.
Pet-immune (up to 18kg) PIR. Common DSC / Tyco alarm-panel sensor; rebadged for Zigbee. HA via Z2M / ZHA.
Pro-tier Danish-made; common in Frient / Develco partners. HA via Z2M / ZHA.
Older TRÅDFRI motion sensor. Replaced by VALLHORN; still widely available used.
Matter-over-Thread weatherproof outdoor PIR. Border router required.
Higher-precision PIR than the standard Aqara motion. Sub-second wake-up. Aqara Hub bridges to HomeKit.

entities.name: Aqara Door & Window Sensor T1 (newer hardware revision)

attributes.note: T1 generation — sealed battery (~5 yr life, then dispose). Bridges to HomeKit via Aqara Hub Matter.

entities.name: Aqara Door & Window Sensor MCC1 Pro

attributes.note: Adds temperature reporting to the MCC1. Aqara Hub for HomeKit / Google / Alexa.
Drills into the door jamb so the sensor is invisible when door is closed. Z-Wave 700.
Z-Wave; pairs with Ring Alarm Base Station only by default. Can be unenrolled and paired to a generic Z-Wave controller (HA Z-Wave JS).
Refresh of the SNZB-04 — longer battery life. Hue-bridge / Aqara / SmartThings / any Zigbee coordinator compatible.
1/4-mile LoRa weatherproof contact — gates, sheds, mailboxes. YoLink Hub required.
Older Ecolink Z-Wave model — predates the 2.5-ECO. Still common on AlarmGrid / SmartThings setups.
Insteon legacy sensor. Only useful if you already have an Insteon hub.

entities.name: Bosch Smart Home Door/Window Contact II Plus

attributes.note: DSC / Tyco-affiliated alarm-grade sensor with tamper. HA via Z2M / ZHA.

entities.name: Third Reality Zigbee Door Sensor 3RDS17BZ Pro

attributes.note: Pro variant adds a temperature sensor to the standard 3RDS17BZ contact.
Refreshed Matter Eve contact — same form factor, new chip. Border router required.
T1 redesign — sealed battery, smaller. Aqara Hub bridges to HomeKit via Matter.
Hub 2 doubles as a temp+humid sensor and an IR blaster + Matter bridge for SwitchBot BLE devices.
Larger LCD than the H5074. HA via the bluetooth integration (passive listen).
Outdoor-rated Matter Eve sensor — temp + humidity + barometric pressure. Border router required.
Sous-vide / smoker version with external probe. HA via the bluetooth + inkbird integration.

entities.name: Honeywell Lyric T6 Pro Wireless Outdoor Sensor

attributes.note: Wireless outdoor temp sensor — pairs only with Honeywell T6 Pro. Reports outdoor temp into the t-stat.

entities.name: Third Reality Zigbee Temp + Humidity Pro

attributes.note: Adds an LCD vs the standard 3RTHS24BZ. Z2M / ZHA only.
Motion + temp + humidity + lux. HA via Z-Wave JS.
P refresh of the SNZB-02 — bigger battery, LCD readout. Hue-bridge / Aqara / SmartThings / any Zigbee coordinator compatible.

entities.name: RATGDO Garage Door Controller (with temp + humidity)

attributes.note: Open-source ESPHome firmware. Reports garage temp + humidity alongside door state. Matter-over-Wi-Fi exposes to HomeKit / Google.
Older YoLink leak puck. Cheaper than Leak 3 Pro; identical LoRa range.
3-pack value SKU. HA via govee2mqtt; Govee push-only API.
Refresh — slightly louder onboard buzzer. Matter via SwitchBot Hub 2.
Long-life CR123A. HA via Z-Wave JS.

entities.name: Ring Alarm Flood + Freeze Sensor (1st Gen)

attributes.note: Cheaper Ecolink puck. HA via Z-Wave JS.
P refresh of the SNZB-05 — longer battery life. HA via Z2M / ZHA.

entities.name: Honeywell Lyric Wi-Fi Water Leak Sensor

attributes.note: Wi-Fi-direct (no hub). HA via the lyric / honeywell_total_connect integration.
Insteon legacy. Buy only if you already have an Insteon hub.
Built-in 85 dB siren. Frient / Develco tier. HA via Z2M / ZHA.
Generic Tuya Zigbee leak puck — sold under MOES, Lonsonho, Aubess. Cheapest reliable Zigbee leak (~$4 each in 5-pack). Z2M / ZHA only.

entities.name: Aqara Water Leak Sensor T1 (newer hardware)

attributes.note: Smaller hardware revision of the Aqara T1 leak. Aqara Hub bridges to HomeKit via Matter.
Required for any Hue or Hue-compatible Zigbee bulb. Bridges Zigbee devices to Wi-Fi and exposes them natively to HomeKit / Google Home / Alexa. Up to 50 lights + 12 accessories per bridge.

Aqara's flagship hub. Bridges Zigbee + Thread devices to Matter, exposing them to every major ecosystem. Acts as Thread Border Router and Matter controller. Replaces the M2 / E1 hub as the recommended choice.
Older Aqara hub, still sold. Bridges Aqara's Zigbee devices to HomeKit / Google / Alexa via local LAN. No Matter or Thread support — pick the M3 if those matter.
Samsung's all-in-one hub: SmartThings + Matter + Thread Border Router + Zigbee + 15W Qi wireless charging pad. The cheapest way to get a Thread border router with full Zigbee + Matter support.
Aeotec-built SmartThings hub with Z-Wave 700 + Zigbee 3.0 + Ethernet. The wired alternative to SmartThings Station for users with existing Z-Wave gear.
Wall-mountable Alexa control panel with Zigbee + Thread border router + Matter controller. Cheapest dedicated control panel from a major ecosystem.

Apple TV 4K (Wi-Fi + Ethernet model with 128 GB) is the cheapest official HomeKit hub that's also a Thread Border Router. Required for remote HomeKit access AND for Thread/Matter device pairing in Apple Home.
The cheapest Apple-made Thread Border Router and HomeKit hub. Doubles as a smart speaker. Pick this OR the Apple TV 4K to enable remote HomeKit access + Thread.
Google Nest Hub 2nd gen acts as Thread Border Router + Matter controller for Google Home. Pick this if Google Home is your primary ecosystem and you need Thread.

entities.name: Ring Alarm Pro Base Station (eero Wi-Fi 6)

attributes.note: Ring Alarm Pro doubles as an eero Wi-Fi 6 mesh router with Z-Wave + Zigbee. Required for Ring Alarm sensors. Includes 24/7 backup cellular with a Ring Protect Pro plan.
Standard Ring Alarm hub. Z-Wave + Zigbee for Ring Alarm sensor compatibility. No Wi-Fi mesh — pick Ring Alarm Pro if you want eero built in.
Required for any Blink camera that records to local USB or to extend battery life. Up to 10 cameras per Sync Module 2. Doesn't work with non-Blink devices.

Required for any Lutron Caseta dimmer / fan / shade / Pico. Reaches devices via Lutron's proprietary Clear Connect RF (rock solid, never on Wi-Fi). Native HomeKit + Google + Alexa + HA via the Lutron LIP integration.

Eufy's flagship hub. Local AI face/object recognition, expandable storage to 16TB, BionicMind cross-camera tracking. Required for many EufyCam models. Local-first — videos never hit the cloud unless you turn it on.
Replaces the older TRÅDFRI Gateway. Bridges IKEA's Zigbee + Matter line to HomeKit / Google / Alexa. Acts as Matter controller. Cheapest IKEA hub.

Local-first hub for power users. Z-Wave 700 + Zigbee 3.0 + LAN integrations. Runs Groovy / Hubitat Package Manager apps. No required cloud — works during internet outages. Steeper learning curve than SmartThings.

Home Assistant Yellow is the official Nabu Casa hardware — Compute Module 4 form factor with Zigbee + Thread radios baked in. Bring your own CM4 (or use the included one in the higher SKU). Power-over-Ethernet capable. The 'just works' HA hardware.
Plug-and-play Home Assistant hub. No radios built in — pair with a Sonoff ZBDongle-E or SkyConnect for Zigbee/Thread. Cheapest official HA appliance.

entities.name: Home Assistant SkyConnect / Connect ZBT-1 USB stick

attributes.note: Official Nabu Casa Zigbee + Thread USB stick. Plugs into any Home Assistant install (Yellow / Green / Pi / NUC). Reflashable between Zigbee and OpenThread firmware. The recommended HA radio.
Cheapest reliable Zigbee 3.0 USB coordinator for Home Assistant (via ZHA or Z2M). Reflashable to Thread/OpenThread. Massive community support.

entities.name: SMLIGHT SLZB-06m PoE Zigbee + Thread Coordinator

attributes.note: PoE Zigbee + Thread coordinator. Network-attached so you can place it where signal coverage is best, not where the HA box lives. Beloved by HA power users.
Legacy combo Z-Wave + Zigbee USB stick. Older Z-Wave 500-series radio. Cheap and abundant on used markets — fine if your Z-Wave gear is older too.
Z-Wave 800 USB stick — newest LR (long range) Z-Wave radio. Pair with Home Assistant via Z-Wave JS for the cleanest Z-Wave 800 install.
Required for Hunter Douglas PowerView motorized shades. Backwards-compatible with Gen 2 shades. Cloud-first; HA via the official PowerView Gen 3 integration.
Required to bridge SOMA Smart Shades / Tilt 2 to Wi-Fi + ecosystems. Without it, SOMA devices are Bluetooth-only and don't reach beyond ~30 ft.
Required for any tado° thermostat (V3+ generation). The newer tado° X line uses Matter directly and bypasses this bridge.
Required for Tapo's sub-GHz sensor line and chime functionality. Also a Wi-Fi range extender.

Bridges SwitchBot's Bluetooth-only line to Wi-Fi + Matter. Adds basic temp/humidity sensor and IR blaster for AC remote control. Required to expose SwitchBot devices to HomeKit / Google / Alexa via Matter.

constraints.rationale: Zigbee is a mesh protocol that needs a coordinator (vendor hub like Hue Bridge / Aqara Hub / TRÅDFRI Gateway, or a generic Zigbee coordinator like SkyConnect / Conbee II / Sonoff ZBDongle paired to Home Assistant). No Zigbee device speaks directly to a phone or speaker.
Zigbee 3.0 is a Zigbee variant; same hub requirement as C1.

Thread is a low-power mesh that talks to the rest of the network via a Thread Border Router. HomePod mini, Apple TV 4K (Wi-Fi+Ethernet), Google Nest Hub (2nd gen), Echo (4th gen), Eero Pro 6E, and SkyConnect can all act as one.

Matter devices need a controller in the chosen ecosystem (Apple Home Hub for HomeKit, Google Home / Nest Hub for Google, Echo for Alexa, the Matter integration in Home Assistant). The border router and the controller are often the same physical device.
Wi-Fi smart devices join the household 2.4 GHz network directly. No hub. Trade-off: Wi-Fi devices add to AP client count and use more power than Zigbee/Thread mesh devices.

An entity is only a valid recommendation for a chosen ecosystem if that ecosystem appears in its supported list. Whether the path is direct, via vendor hub, or via Matter is captured per-entity in `ecosystems_via_*` attributes.

goals.prompt: Prefer entities that work natively in the chosen ecosystem with the fewest hops.
Across all selected entities, minimize the number of distinct hubs the user has to own.
When two entities are equally compatible, prefer Matter-certified ones; they survive ecosystem switches without re-buying.
